page: Microsoft Azure DC2as_v5 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the DCASv5 server family. It features an x86_64 AMD processor with 2 dedicated virtual CPUs and 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory allocation of 4.0 GB per core. The instance runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This server type does not include local storage, meaning it relies entirely on external storage options. It is Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance persistent disks. There are no complimentary public IPv4 addresses bundled with this instance, and it does not feature any GPU hardware.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation provides predictable performance compared to shared-core burstable instances, making it a stable entry-level option for workloads requiring consistent compute resources without high density. The balanced vCPU-to-RAM ratio makes it suitable for general-purpose workloads, lightweight web serving, small databases, and basic development or testing environments.
description: Microsoft Azure DC2as_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the DCASv5 family, powered by an x86_64 AMD processor. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs and 8.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance does not include local storage but is Premium Storage capable, allowing connection to external high-performance persistent volumes. It contains no integrated GPUs and does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. With its dedicated CPU allocation, the DC2as_v5 offers predictable performance for entry-level workloads compared to shared-core alternatives. It is best suited for general-purpose applications, lightweight web servers, development environments, and small-scale database deployments that require consistent compute resources without the overhead of larger multi-core configurations.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC2as_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 2 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

tagline: A dedicated dual-core virtual machine featuring a balanced memory configuration designed to support predictable performance for entry-level compute workloads.
